---
name: Feature / analysis suggestion
about: A new analysis, visualisation, or dataset extension
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What are you proposing?**
A clear description of the analysis, feature, or extension.

**Why is it useful?**
How does it advance the research programme or improve usability?

**Are you able to contribute it yourself?**
- [ ] Yes, I can open a pull request
- [ ] Partially — I can advise but would need implementation help
- [ ] No — I'm suggesting it for the maintainer to consider

**Additional context**
Relevant references, prior work, or examples.
